    Automated deployment @ 2025-06-30 10:23:01 Asia/Shanghai

    Welcome to contribute! Add your topics and keywords in topic.yml. You can also view historical data through the storage.

    Embodied Intelligence

    Embodied Cognition

    2025-06-27 Embodied AI Agents: Modeling the World Pascale Fung et.al. 2506.22355v1 null
    2025-06-27 4D-VLA: Spatiotemporal Vision-Language-Action Pretraining with Cross-Scene Calibration Jiahui Zhang et.al. 2506.22242v1 null
    2025-06-27 Robust and Accurate Multi-view 2D/3D Image Registration with Differentiable X-ray Rendering and Dual Cross-view Constraints Yuxin Cui et.al. 2506.22191v1 null
    2025-06-27 KnotDLO: Toward Interpretable Knot Tying Holly Dinkel et.al. 2506.22176v1 null
    2025-06-27 ASVSim (AirSim for Surface Vehicles): A High-Fidelity Simulation Framework for Autonomous Surface Vehicle Research Bavo Lesy et.al. 2506.22174v1 null
    2025-06-27 RM-Dijkstra: A surface optimal path planning algorithm based on Riemannian metric Yu Zhang et.al. 2506.22170v1 null
    2025-06-27 NoticeLight: Embracing Socio-Technical Asymmetry through Tangible Peripheral Robotic Embodiment in Hybrid Collaboration Marie Altmann et.al. 2506.22125v1 null
    2025-06-27 Evaluating Pointing Gestures for Target Selection in Human-Robot Collaboration Noora Sassali et.al. 2506.22116v1 null
    2025-06-27 An Introduction to Zero-Order Optimization Techniques for Robotics Armand Jordana et.al. 2506.22087v1 null
    2025-06-27 Multi-Robot Assembly of Deformable Linear Objects Using Multi-Modal Perception Kejia Chen et.al. 2506.22034v1 null
    2025-06-27 LMPVC and Policy Bank: Adaptive voice control for industrial robots with code generating LLMs and reusable Pythonic policies Ossi Parikka et.al. 2506.22028v1 null
    2025-06-27 RoboEnvision: A Long-Horizon Video Generation Model for Multi-Task Robot Manipulation Liudi Yang et.al. 2506.22007v1 null

    2025-06-27 SceneDiffuser++: City-Scale Traffic Simulation via a Generative World Model Shuhan Tan et.al. 2506.21976v1 null
    2025-06-27 TASeg: Text-aware RGB-T Semantic Segmentation based on Fine-tuning Vision Foundation Models Meng Yu et.al. 2506.21975v1 null

    2025-06-27 Integrating Multi-Modal Sensors: A Review of Fusion Techniques for Intelligent Vehicles Chuheng Wei et.al. 2506.21885v1 null
    2025-06-27 UnMix-NeRF: Spectral Unmixing Meets Neural Radiance Fields Fabian Perez et.al. 2506.21884v1 null
